2603.13065.title: L2GTX: From Local to Global Time Series Explanations
2603.13065.paper_summary: Deep learning models achieve high accuracy in time series classification, yet understanding their class-level decision behaviour remains challenging. Explanations for time series must respect temporal dependencies and identify patterns that recur across instances. Existing approaches face three limitations: model-agnostic XAI methods developed for images and tabular data do not readily extend to time series, global explanation synthesis for time series remains underexplored, and most existing global approaches are model-specific. We propose L2GTX, a model-agnostic framework that generates class-wise global explanations by aggregating local explanations from a representative set of instances. L2GTX extracts clusters of parameterised temporal event primitives, such as increasing or decreasing trends and local extrema, together with their importance scores from instance-level explanations produced by LOMATCE. These clusters are merged across instances to reduce redundancy, and an instance-cluster importance matrix is used to estimate global relevance. Under a user-defined instance selection budget, L2GTX selects representative instances that maximise coverage of influential clusters. Events from the selected instances are then aggregated into concise class-wise global explanations. Experiments on six benchmark time series datasets show that L2GTX produces compact and interpretable global explanations while maintaining stable global faithfulness measured as mean local surrogate fidelity.
2603.13065.paper_summary_zh: 深度學習模型在時間序列分類中達到了高準確率，但理解它們的類別決策行為仍然具有挑戰性。時間序列的解釋必須尊重時間依賴性並識別在實例中重複出現的模式。現有的方法面臨三個限制：為圖像和表格數據開發的模型無關的解釋性人工智慧（XAI）方法不易擴展到時間序列，時間序列的全局解釋綜合仍然未被充分探索，且大多數現有的全局方法是特定於模型的。我們提出了L2GTX，一個模型無關的框架，通過聚合來自代表性實例集的局部解釋來生成類別級的全局解釋。L2GTX提取參數化的時間事件原語的聚類，例如上升或下降趨勢和局部極值，連同它們的權重分數，這些分數來自LOMATCE生成的實例級解釋。這些聚類在實例之間合併以減少冗餘，並使用實例-聚類重要性矩陣來估計全局相關性。在用戶定義的實例選擇預算下，L2GTX選擇代表性實例，以最大化影響聚類的覆蓋率。然後，從選定的實例中聚合事件，以形成簡潔的類別級全局解釋。對六個基準時間序列數據集的實驗顯示，L2GTX生成了緊湊且可解釋的全局解釋，同時保持穩定的全局可信度，這是通過平均局部替代忠實度來衡量的。
2603.13065.author: Ephrem Tibebe Mekonnen et.al.
2603.13065.authors: Ephrem Tibebe Mekonnen, Luca Longo, Lucas Rizzo, Pierpaolo Dondio
